treatment_group.description: Treatment group summary data: a_1=751 events (successes) out of n_1=8506 subjects. Used to compute p̂_1=0.08839. Same outcome measure as control_group but under treatment condition.

control_group.description: Control group summary data: a_2=623 events (successes) out of n_2=8102 subjects. Used to compute p̂_2=0.07700. Same outcome measure as treatment_group but under control condition.
